mapper.select: SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPLOYEE_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID LIMIT 1
SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPLOYEE_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId} ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} AND EMPLOYEE_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT r.ROOM_ID AS roomId, r.ROOM_TYPE AS roomType, r.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, lm.CONTENT AS lastMessage, lm.SENT_AT AS lastMessageTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m WHERE m.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND (rm.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID IS NULL OR m.MESSAGE_ID > rm.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID) AND (m.SENDER_ID IS NULL OR m.SENDER_ID != #{employeeId}) ) AS unreadCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER cm2 WHERE cm2.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID) AS memberCount, other.EMPLOYEE_ID AS otherEmployeeId, other.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS otherEmployeeName, od.DEPT_NAME AS otherDeptName, op.POSITION_NAME AS otherPositionName FROM CHAT_ROOM r JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND rm.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} LEFT JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE lm ON lm.MESSAGE_ID = ( SELECT MAX(m2.MESSAGE_ID) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m2 WHERE m2.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID ) LEFT JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER other_m ON r.ROOM_TYPE = 'DM' AND other_m.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND other_m.EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId} LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE other ON other.EMPLOYEE_ID = other_m.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT od ON od.DEPT_ID = other.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION op ON op.POSITION_ID = other.POSITION_ID ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.SENT_AT, r.CREATED_AT) DESC

SELECT r.ROOM_ID AS roomId, r.ROOM_TYPE AS roomType, r.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, r.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, other.EMPLOYEE_ID AS otherEmployeeId, other.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS otherEmployeeName, od.DEPT_NAME AS otherDeptName, op.POSITION_NAME AS otherPositionName FROM CHAT_ROOM r LEFT JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER other_m ON r.ROOM_TYPE = 'DM' AND other_m.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND other_m.EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId} LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE other ON other.EMPLOYEE_ID = other_m.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT od ON od.DEPT_ID = other.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION op ON op.POSITION_ID = other.POSITION_ID WHERE r.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER mine WHERE mine.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND mine.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} )

SELECT rm1.ROOM_ID FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER rm1 JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER rm2 ON rm1.ROOM_ID = rm2.ROOM_ID JOIN CHAT_ROOM r ON r.ROOM_ID = rm1.ROOM_ID WHERE r.ROOM_TYPE = 'DM' AND rm1.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{empId1} AND rm2.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{empId2} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_TYPE, ROOM_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{roomType}, #{roomName}, NOW())
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER (ROOM_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, JOINED_AT) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{employeeId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT cm.ROOM_ID AS roomId, cm.EMPLOYEE_ID AS employeeId, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, p.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, cm.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID AS lastReadMessageId FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = cm.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = e.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION p ON p.POSITION_ID = e.POSITION_ID WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE (ROOM_ID, SENDER_ID, MESSAGE_TYPE, CONTENT, SENT_AT) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, m.ROOM_ID AS roomId, m.SENDER_ID AS senderId, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS senderName, p.POSITION_NAME AS senderPositionName, m.MESSAGE_TYPE AS messageType, m.CONTENT AS content, a.FILE_NAME AS fileName, a.FILE_PATH AS filePath, a.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, m.SENT_AT AS sentAt FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = m.SENDER_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION p ON p.POSITION_ID = e.POSITION_ID LEFT JOIN CHAT_ATTACHMENT a ON a.MESSAGE_ID = m.MESSAGE_ID WHERE m.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ATTACHMENT (MESSAGE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID) FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId}
